diff: The Plasma SkyLink Bridge can be frozen from Ethereum Mainnet by the Ethereum SkyLink Freezer Multisig as specified in [A.1.9.4.1.1 - Ethereum SkyLink Freezer Multisig](21fa6749-6209-4280-9b5f-b2a73d400421). The document herein defines the Plasma-side freezer multisig.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
